sources.label: ACME Platform 1.0 (demo cascade)
sources.description: Three-document cascade with one deliberately unresolved reference to explore.

sources.label: ACME Platform 1.0 — full tree
sources.description: Same cascade, but every referenced document is fetched recursively.

sources.label: ACME Platform (SPDX 3.0.1)
sources.description: The same platform as an SPDX 3.0.1 JSON-LD cascade — the BSI-baseline format.

sources.label: ACME web delivery — acceptance check
sources.description: A file-level SBOM plus the delivered files: one matches, one is tampered, one is missing, one is an extra the SBOM never listed.

sources.label: ACME web (CycloneDX 1.6)
sources.description: A CycloneDX pair: the web BOM links its auth subsystem's BOM by BOM-Link (urn:cdx), and the cascade resolves. One component is identified only by CPE - load the CSAF demo advisory to see it matched.
